title: The Gantt view stopped working but only in one of my boards
excerpt: Suddenly in one of my boards when I am going to the Gantt view or Timeline view, nothing appears. All settings look ok and in the main table and Kanban view everything appears properly. Dont know what to do and it doesnt…

posts.author: Lili (DIMITRA-MARIA KASIMI-STRIMENOPOULOU)
posts.cookedHtml: Suddenly in one of my boards when I am going to the Gantt view or Timeline view, nothing appears. All settings look ok and in the main table and Kanban view everything appears properly. Dont know what to do and it doesnt seem to be a problem with other boards
